[12/01/25, 8:24:31 PM] Manav: #include<stdio.h>

int main()
{
    int n;
    printf("Enter size of Bitionic array: ");
    scanf("%d",&n);

    int arr[n];
    printf("\nEnter Elements of Bitionic Array\n ");
    for(int i=0 ; i<n ; i++)
    {
        printf("Enter element %d : ",i+1);
        scanf("%d",&arr[i]);
    }

    for(int i=0 ; i<n ; i++)
    {
        printf("%d ",arr[i]);
    }

    int low = 0;
    int high = n-1;
    int mid,max;

    for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
    {
        mid = (high + low)/2;
        if(arr[mid-1]>arr[mid])
        {
            high = mid-1;
        }
        else if(arr[mid+1]>arr[mid])
        {
            low = mid+1;
        }
        else
        {
            max = arr[mid];
        }
    }

    printf("\nMaximum Element in Bitionic Array is : %d", max);       
}

[20/02/25, 12:24:26 PM] Neel Lapsiwala: class Bank:
    
    def __init__(self, balance, account_no):
        self.balance = balance
        self.account_no = account_no
        
    def credit(self, amount):
        self.balance += amount
        print("₹",amount,"credited")
        
    def debit(self, amount):
        self.balance -= amount
        print("₹",amount,"debited")
        
    def get_balance(self):
        return self.balance
        
acc1 = Bank(10000,"abcdef")
print(acc1.balance)
print(acc1.account_no)
acc1.credit(600)
acc1.debit(500)
print(acc1.get_balance())
[20/02/25, 12:24:27 PM] Neel Lapsiwala: Q3
[20/02/25, 12:24:27 PM] Neel Lapsiwala: class Bank:
    
    def __init__(self, balance, account_no):
        self.balance = balance
        self.account_no = account_no
        
    def deposit(self, amount):
        self.balance += amount
        print("₹",amount,"deposited")
        
    def withdraw(self, amount):
        self.balance -= amount
        print("₹",amount,"withdrawn")
        
    def details(self):
        print("account_no:",self.account_no)
        print("balance:",self.balance)
        
acc1 = Bank(10000,"abcdef")
print(acc1.balance)
print(acc1.account_no)
x=int(input("enter amount you want to deposit: "))
acc1.deposit(x)
y=int(input("enter amount you want to withdraw: "))
acc1.withdraw(y)
acc1.details()

[24/04/25, 4:31:24 PM] Manav: def safe(board, row, col, n):
    for i in range(row):
        if board[i][col] == 'Q':
            return False

    # Check top-left diagonal
    i, j = row, col
    while i >= 0 and j >= 0:
        if board[i][j] == 'Q':
            return False
        i -= 1
        j -= 1

    # Check top-right diagonal
    i, j = row, col
    while i >= 0 and j < n:
        if board[i][j] == 'Q':
            return False
        i -= 1
        j += 1

    return True


def nqueens(board, row, n, ans):
    if row == n:
        ans.append(["".join(row) for row in board])  
        return

    for col in range(n):  
        if safe(board, row, col, n):
            board[row][col] = 'Q'  
            nqueens(board, row + 1, n, ans)
            board[row][col] = '.' 



n = 8
board = [["."] * n for _ in range(n)]
ans = []

nqueens(board, 0, n, ans)

for solution in ans:
    for row in solution:
        print(row)
    print()
[24/04/25, 5:18:42 PM] Manav: def odd_square(n):
    if n % 2 == 0:
        raise ValueError("Only odd-order magic squares are supported by this method.")
    
    magic_square = [[0] * n for _ in range(n)]
    
    i, j = 0, n // 2  # Start from the middle of the top row
    
    for num in range(1, n * n + 1):
        magic_square[i][j] = num
        new_i, new_j = (i - 1) % n, (j + 1) % n
        
        if magic_square[new_i][new_j]:  # If the new position is already filled
            i += 1
        else:
            i, j = new_i, new_j
    
    return magic_square
def even_square(n):
    if n % 4 != 0:
        raise ValueError("Only doubly even numbers (divisible by 4) are allowed")

    magic_square = [[(n * i) + j + 1 for j in range(n)] for i in range(n)]

    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(n):
            if (i % 4 == j % 4) or ((i + j) % 4 == 3):
                magic_square[i][j] = n * n + 1 - magic_square[i][j]

    return magic_square

n=int(input("enter number:"))
if n%2!=0:
    ans=odd_square(n)
    for i in ans:
        print(i)
else:
    a=even_square(n)
    for i in a:
        print(i)

Step 1: Sort coins in decreasing order

Step 2: Initialize count = 0

Step 3: For each coin in coins:
            count = count + (R / coin)
            R = R % coin
            If R == 0:
                Break

Step 4: Output count (minimum number of coins)

CREATE TABLE Customers(
    CustomerID INT PRIMARY KEY,
    CustomerName VARCHAR(100),
    ContactName VARCHAR(100),
    Address VARCHAR(200),
    City VARCHAR(100),
    PostalCode VARCHAR(20),
    Country VARCHAR(50)
);

CREATE TABLE Books(
    BookID INT PRIMARY KEY,
    Title VARCHAR(100),
    Author VARCHAR(100),
    Publisher VARCHAR(100),
    Language VARCHAR(50),
    Price DECIMAL(10,2)
);

(4, 'Python Programming', 'Mark Lutz', 'OReilly', 'English', 450),

select * from books;
SELECT Author FROM Books WHERE Author LIKE 'A%';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Author),Language FROM Books GROUP BY Language;

SELECT Title, Author, Language FROM Books ORDER BY Language; 

SELECT * FROM Books WHERE Price > 500;

SELECT Author,COUNT(*) FROM Books GROUP BY Author HAVING COUNT(*) > 3;

SELECT Publisher,Title FROM Books WHERE Price > 250 GROUP BY Author;

SELECT Author, AVG(Price) FROM Books GROUP BY Author;

SELECT Author, Title FROM Books WHERE Price = (SELECT MAX(Price) FROM Books);
SELECT Author, Title FROM Books WHERE Price = (SELECT MIN(Price) FROM Books);

SELECT Author, Title, Price
FROM Books
WHERE Price = (
    SELECT MAX(Price)
    FROM Books
    WHERE Price < (SELECT MAX(Price) FROM Books)
);

select semester,name from student where name like '%a%';

SELECT COUNT(*),semester FROM student GROUP BY semester;

SELECT Name, Branch FROM student WHERE RollNo = 7;

SELECT Semester, COUNT(*) AS StudentCount FROM Student WHERE MONTH(DOB) = 8 GROUP BY Semester;

SELECT RollNo, Name, AdmissionDate FROM Student WHERE AdmissionDate = (SELECT MIN(AdmissionDate) FROM Student);

SELECT MONTH(DOB) AS BirthMonth, COUNT(*) FROM Student GROUP BY MONTH(DOB);

select * from student;

 
SELECT AVG(StudentCount) AS AvgStudentsPerSemester
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS StudentCount
    FROM Student
    GROUP BY Semester
)AS Temp;


SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Student WHERE AdmissionDate >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH);

SELECT Semester FROM Student GROUP BY Semester ORDER BY COUNT(*) LIMIT 1;


CREATE TABLE HospitalManagement(
    DoctorID INT,
    DoctorName VARCHAR(100),
    Specialization VARCHAR(50),
    Salary DECIMAL(10,2),
    PatientID INT,
    PatientName VARCHAR(100),
    AdmissionDate DATE,
    DischargeDate DATE
);

INSERT INTO HospitalManagement
(DoctorID, DoctorName, Specialization, Salary, PatientID, PatientName, AdmissionDate, DischargeDate)
VALUES
(101, 'Dr. Arjun', 'Cardiology', 60000, 1, 'Amit', '2024-01-05', '2024-01-15'),
(102, 'Dr. Meera', 'Neurology', 50000, 2, 'Ravi', '2024-02-10', '2024-02-20'),
(103, 'Dr. Sneha', 'Cancer', 55000, 3, 'Anita', '2024-03-01', '2024-03-18'),
(104, 'Dr. Raj', 'Orthopedics', 50000, 4, 'Karan', '2024-04-12', '2024-04-25'),
(105, 'Dr. Anil', 'Cardiology', 60000, 5, 'Pooja', '2024-05-05', '2024-05-15'),
(106, 'Dr. Riya', 'Cancer', 45000, 6, 'Neha', '2024-06-02', '2024-06-10');

SELECT PatientName FROM HospitalManagement WHERE PatientName LIKE '%a%';
SELECT Specialization, COUNT(DISTINCT DoctorID) AS DoctorCount FROM HospitalManagement GROUP BY Specialization;
SELECT DoctorName, Specialization FROM HospitalManagement WHERE DoctorID = 101;
SELECT DISTINCT DoctorID, DoctorName FROM HospitalManagement WHERE NOT Specialization = 'Cancer';

SELECT Specialization, COUNT(*) AS DoctorCount FROM HospitalManagement WHERE Salary = 50000 GROUP BY Specialization;
SELECT PatientID, PatientName FROM HospitalManagement WHERE AdmissionDate = (SELECT MIN(AdmissionDate) FROM HospitalManagement);
SELECT AVG(PatientCount) AS AvgPatients
FROM (
    SELECT MONTH(AdmissionDate) AS MonthNum, COUNT(DISTINCT PatientID) AS PatientCount
    FROM HospitalManagement
    GROUP BY MONTH(AdmissionDate)
) AS t;

SELECT MONTH(DischargeDate) AS MonthNum, COUNT(DISTINCT PatientID) AS PatientCount
FROM HospitalManagement
WHERE MONTH(DischargeDate) BETWEEN 1 AND 5
GROUP BY MONTH(DischargeDate)
ORDER BY MonthNum;


SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PatientID) AS RecentAdmissions
FROM HospitalManagement
WHERE AdmissionDate >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH);

SELECT Specialization FROM HospitalManagement GROUP BY Specialization ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT DoctorID) ASC LIMIT 1;


CREATE TABLE Author (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100),
    birth_year INT,
    death_year INT
);

CREATE TABLE Book (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    author_id INT,
    title VARCHAR(200),
    publish_year INT,
    publishing_house VARCHAR(100),
    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES Author(id)
);

CREATE TABLE Adaptation (
    book_id INT,
    type VARCHAR(50),
    title VARCHAR(200),
    release_year INT,
    rating DECIMAL(3,1),
    FOREIGN KEY (book_id) REFERENCES Book(id)
);

CREATE TABLE Book_review (
    book_id INT,
    review VARCHAR(300),
    author VARCHAR(100),
    FOREIGN KEY (book_id) REFERENCES Book(id)
);

INSERT INTO Author VALUES
(1, 'R.K. Narayan', 1906, 2001),
(2, 'Chetan Bhagat', 1974, NULL),
(3, 'Amish Tripathi', 1974, NULL);

INSERT INTO Book VALUES
(1, 1, 'Malgudi Days', 1943, 'Indian Thought'),
(2, 2, 'Five Point Someone', 2004, 'Rupa'),
(3, 2, '2 States', 2009, 'Rupa'),
(4, 3, 'The Immortals of Meluha', 2010, 'Westland');

INSERT INTO Adaptation VALUES
(2, 'Movie', '3 Idiots', 2009, 9.0),
(3, 'Movie', '2 States', 2014, 7.2);

INSERT INTO Book_review VALUES
(1, 'Very nice stories', 'Priya'),
(2, 'Good college story', 'Ravi');

SELECT Author.name, Book.title, Book.publish_year
FROM Author, Book
WHERE Author.id = Book.author_id;

SELECT Author.name, Book.title, Book.publish_year
FROM Author, Book
WHERE Author.id = Book.author_id AND Book.publish_year > 2005;

SELECT Book.title, Adaptation.title, Adaptation.release_year, Book.publish_year
FROM Book, Adaptation
WHERE Book.id = Adaptation.book_id;

SELECT Book.title, Adaptation.title, Adaptation.release_year
FROM Book
LEFT JOIN Adaptation ON Book.id = Adaptation.book_id;

SELECT Book.title, Book.publishing_house, Adaptation.title, Adaptation.type
FROM Book
LEFT JOIN Adaptation ON Book.id = Adaptation.book_id;

SELECT Book.title, Book_review.review, Book_review.author
FROM Book
LEFT JOIN Book_review ON Book.id = Book_review.book_id;

SELECT Book.title, Author.name
FROM Book
FULL JOIN Author
ON Book.author_id = Author.id;


SELECT Book.title, Author.name
FROM Book
LEFT JOIN Author ON Book.author_id = Author.id
UNION
SELECT Book.title, Author.name
FROM Author
RIGHT JOIN Book ON Book.author_id = Author.id;


CREATE TABLE Department (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100)
);

CREATE TABLE Producer (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100)
);

CREATE TABLE Product (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100),
    department_id INT,
    shelf_id VARCHAR(20),
    producer_id INT,
    price DECIMAL(10,2),
    FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES Department(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (producer_id) REFERENCES Producer(id)
);

CREATE TABLE Nutrition_data (
    product_id INT,
    calories INT,
    fat DECIMAL(5,2),
    carbohydrate DECIMAL(5,2),
    protein DECIMAL(5,2),
    FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES Product(id)
);

CREATE TABLE Sales_history (
    date DATE,
    product_id INT,
    amount INT,
    FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES Product(id)
);

INSERT INTO Department VALUES
(1, 'Snacks'),
(2, 'Beverages'),
(3, 'Dairy'),
(4, 'Bakery');

INSERT INTO Producer VALUES
(1, 'Amul'),
(2, 'Parle'),
(3, 'Tata Consumer'),
(4, 'Britannia');

INSERT INTO Product VALUES
(1, 'Amul Milk', 3, 'S1', 1, 25.00),
(2, 'Parle-G Biscuits', 1, 'S2', 2, 10.00),
(3, 'Tata Tea', 2, 'S3', 3, 150.00),
(4, 'Britannia Bread', 4, 'S4', 4, 35.00),
(5, 'Lassi Bottle', 3, 'S1', 1, 30.00);

INSERT INTO Nutrition_data VALUES
(1, 120, 3.5, 12.0, 8.0),
(2, 80, 2.0, 15.0, 2.0),
(3, 0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0),
(4, 200, 5.0, 35.0, 6.0),
(5, 140, 3.0, 16.0, 7.0);

SELECT Product.name AS product, Department.name AS department
FROM Product, Department, Nutrition_data
WHERE Product.department_id = Department.id
AND Product.id = Nutrition_data.product_id
AND Nutrition_data.calories < 150;

SELECT Product.name AS product_name,
       Product.price AS product_price,
       Producer.name AS producer_name,
      Department.name AS department_name
FROM Product
LEFT JOIN Producer ON Product.producer_id = Producer.id
LEFT JOIN Department ON Product.department_id = Department.id;

SELECT Producer.name AS producer_name,
       Department.name AS department_name,
       Product.name AS product_name,
       Nutrition_data.carbohydrate
FROM Product
LEFT JOIN Producer ON Product.producer_id = Producer.id
LEFT JOIN Department ON Product.department_id = Department.id
LEFT JOIN Nutrition_data ON Product.id = Nutrition_data.product_id;

[19/11/25, 10:26:15 PM] Manav: CREATE TABLE emp (
    emp_no     NUMBER(4),
    emp_name   VARCHAR2(30),
    emp_sal    NUMBER(8,2),
    emp_comm   NUMBER(6,2),
    dept_no    NUMBER(3)
);
INSERT INTO emp VALUES (100, 'John',    3000, 200, 10);
INSERT INTO emp VALUES (101, 'Anish',   2200, NULL, 20);
INSERT INTO emp VALUES (102, 'Anita',   2100, 150, 20);
INSERT INTO emp VALUES (103, 'Mike',    3500, NULL, 30);
INSERT INTO emp VALUES (104, 'Sunil',   2800, 100, 10);

COMMIT;


SET SERVEROUTPUT ON;

DECLARE
    -- Step 1: Declare the cursor
    CURSOR emp_cur IS
        SELECT emp_no, emp_name, emp_sal, emp_comm, dept_no
        FROM emp;

    -- Step 2: Declare variables to hold fetched row values
    v_empno     emp.emp_no%TYPE;
    v_ename     emp.emp_name%TYPE;
    v_salary    emp.emp_sal%TYPE;
    v_comm      emp.emp_comm%TYPE;
    v_deptno    emp.dept_no%TYPE;

BEGIN
    -- Step 3: Open cursor
    OPEN emp_cur;

    -- Step 4: Fetch rows one by one
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cur INTO v_empno, v_ename, v_salary, v_comm, v_deptno;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cur%NOTFOUND;

        -- Step 5: Display employee details
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(
            'Emp No: ' || v_empno ||
            ' | Name: ' || v_ename ||
            ' | Salary: ' || v_salary ||
            ' | Commission: ' || NVL(v_comm,0) ||
            ' | Dept No: ' || v_deptno
        );
    END LOOP;

    -- Step 6: Close cursor
    CLOSE emp_cur;
END;
/

[19/11/25, 10:35:55 PM] Manav: DECLARE
    CURSOR emp_cur IS
        SELECT emp_no, emp_name, emp_sal, dept_no FROM emp;

    v_no   emp.emp_no%TYPE;
    v_name emp.emp_name%TYPE;
    v_sal  emp.emp_sal%TYPE;
    v_dept emp.dept_no%TYPE;
BEGIN
    OPEN emp_cur;
    LOOP
        FETCH emp_cur INTO v_no, v_name, v_sal, v_dept;
        EXIT WHEN emp_cur%NOTFOUND;

        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('No: '||v_no||'  Name: '||v_name||
                             '  Salary: '||v_sal||'  Dept: '||v_dept);
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE emp_cur;
END;

------

SET SERVEROUTPUT ON;

DECLARE
    CURSOR c_emp IS SELECT * FROM emp;
    r_emp c_emp%ROWTYPE;
BEGIN
    OPEN c_emp;
    LOOP
        FETCH c_emp INTO r_emp;
        EXIT WHEN c_emp%NOTFOUND;

        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(
            'Emp No: '||r_emp.emp_no||
            ', Name: '||r_emp.emp_name||
            ', Salary: '||r_emp.emp_sal||
            ', Dept: '||r_emp.dept_no
        );
    END LOOP;
    CLOSE c_emp;
END;
/


-------


SET SERVEROUTPUT ON;

BEGIN
    FOR rec IN (SELECT emp_no, emp_name, emp_sal, dept_no FROM emp)
    LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(
            rec.emp_no || ' - ' || rec.emp_name ||
            ' - ' || rec.emp_sal || ' - ' || rec.dept_no
        );
    END LOOP;
END;
/


-------

SET SERVEROUTPUT ON;

DECLARE
    CURSOR c1 IS
        SELECT emp_no, emp_name, emp_sal, dept_no FROM emp;
BEGIN
    FOR rec IN c1 LOOP
        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(
            rec.emp_no || ' | ' || rec.emp_name ||
            ' | ' || rec.emp_sal || ' | ' || rec.dept_no
        );
    END LOOP;
END;
